---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Set up catalog/free standing table using ... (any IRC catalog or write to local file system)
1. Create a table using ... (any iceberg engine) 
2. (Maybe) Insert/Update/Alter Table using (some other engine or catalog features)
4. Read/Alter/Update Table and observe error

DuckDB can be involved in any one of these steps, please make the reproducer small as possible.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
